'''Grungeon Block''' was a a twenty-square-kilometer area of [[The Works/Legends|The Works]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It had once housed production centers for [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]], [[Hunvicko]], and [[Nebula Manufacturing]]. The manufacturers declared bankruptcy and abandoned the Block.

==Behind the scenes==
The Grungeon Block was first mentioned in ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', which placed it in the [[Factory District]]. However, later sources moved the Grungeon Block and Sidious's hangar to [[The Works/Legends|the Works]] in the [[Dacho District]], near the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]].
